results.title: "Rusagro" transferred to the management of Rosselkhozbank's structure after the controlling stake was transferred to the state
results.description: PJSC "Rusagro Group" has been transferred to the management of LLC "RSHB-Finance", a structure of Rosselkhozbank. The corresponding entry was made in the Unified State Register of Legal Entities on May 28, 2026.

results.title: XPON Technologies Group Secures $800,000 Loan Facility for Growth
results.description: XPON Technologies Group Limited (ASX: XPN) today announced it has entered into a new loan facility agreement valued at $800,000. results.description: Lowe's offers the Keter Premium One Garage Cabinet for $179, a $30 low. MyLowe's Rewards members get free shipping (it's free to join). Deal ends June 3rd. Buy Now at Lowe's Features measures 35" x 74" x 18.5" Model: 259991
